scripts.test: node -e "const p=require('@babel/parser');const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');let ok=0,fail=0;function check(fp){try{p.parse(fs.readFileSync(fp,'utf8'),{sourceType:'module',plugins:['jsx','flow']});ok++}catch(e){console.error('FAIL:',fp,e.message);fail++}}function scan(dir){const s=fs.statSync(dir);if(s.isFile()&&dir.endsWith('.js')){check(dir);return}for(const f of fs.readdirSync(dir,{withFileTypes:true})){const fp=path.join(dir,f.name);if(f.isDirectory())scan(fp);else if(f.name.endsWith('.js'))check(fp)}};scan('App.js');['src'].forEach(d=>scan(d));console.log('Checked '+(ok+fail)+' files, '+ok+' OK'+(fail>0?', '+fail+' FAIL':''));if(fail)process.exit(1)"
